name: chr2_2q14_3_IL1F_cluster
description: 2q14.3 interleukin-1 family (IL1F) gene cluster. IL1A, IL1B, IL1RN, IL18 and the IL1F5-F10 (IL36/IL37/IL38) genes arose by tandem segmental duplication; cluster shows population copy-number variation at the IL1F gene boundary.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem array of IL1-family coding genes (IL1A, IL1B, IL1RN, IL36A/B/G, IL37, IL38, IL18) at 50-85% identity; intronic structure preserved across paralogs.
